_readme: Hero-augment encodings, one entry per pred.gg catalog augment (keys augment:<hero>:<catalog-id> join the field evidence). Same schema and curation rules as effects.json: only stated numbers, unmodeled with a note otherwise. Regenerate review: this file is hand-curated; npm run augments only refreshes the catalog it was curated FROM - diff new descriptions against sourceText here after a patch.

augment:aurora:12.name: Aurora / Frozen Fury
augment:aurora:12.sourceText: Frost Storm grants 10-34% Attack Speed while active. Increases with Hero Level.

effects.note: attack speed only while Frost Storm is active; uptime unstated

augment:skylar:14.name: Skylar / Atomised Artillery
augment:skylar:14.sourceText: Atomiser fires 3 blasts in succession, each dealing 60% of the original damage.

effects.note: 3 blasts x 60% = 180% of the original single blast

augment:skylar:15.name: Skylar / Plasma Barrage
augment:skylar:15.sourceText: Plasma Grenade reduces its own Cooldown by 3.5s when attaching to an Enemy Hero.

effects.note: hero-attach conditional, modeled as hitting (sim convention)

augment:boris:17.name: Boris / Bolster Bearicade
augment:boris:17.sourceText: While Tesseract Core is active, gain 15% increased Armors.

effects.note: 15% armors only while Tesseract Core is active; uptime unstated

augment:boris:18.name: Boris / Savage Shred
augment:boris:18.sourceText: Detection Protocol's Mark Shreds 35% Physical Armor for 5s when consumed.

effects.note: mark-consume counted as maintained during the window (Q + basic flow)

augment:boris:19.name: Boris / Apex Hunter
augment:boris:19.sourceText: Chrono Swipe deals 70% more damage to Heroes below 20% Max Health.

effects.note: execute-threshold conditional (+70% below 20% HP); window-dependent

augment:countess:20.name: Countess / Blood Well
augment:countess:20.sourceText: Takedowns summon a pool of blood with 18 charges for 120s. While standing in the pool, Countess consumes a charge to restore 2% Max Health and 2.5% Max Mana every 0.25s.

effects.note: takedown-conditional pool sustain; out-of-combat economy

augment:countess:21.name: Countess / Sanguine Slash
augment:countess:21.sourceText: Blade Siphon deals 20% more damage to Isolated Targets.

effects.note: isolated-target condition modeled as met: kill-window sims are 1v1

augment:crunch:23.name: Crunch / Combo Crunch
augment:crunch:23.sourceText: Dealing damage with Cross Crunch grants 6% Total Attack Speed for 3s, stacking up to 5 times.

effects.note: stacking attack speed off passive hits; cadence unobservable
dash range utility

augment:crunch:25.name: Crunch / Falcon Crunch
augment:crunch:25.sourceText: Empowered Right Crunch deals 10% increased damage and launches Crunch 4x higher when used mid-air. Its Cooldown is 30% longer when this occurs.

effects.note: conditional mid-air empowerment with cooldown penalty; situational

augment:dekker:28.name: Dekker / Photon Efficiency
augment:dekker:28.sourceText: Photon Disruptor deals 10% more damage and its Cooldown is reduced by 15% when it hits a Hero.

augment:drongo:29.name: Drongo / Bring The Boom
augment:drongo:29.sourceText: Rad Rounds deals 60% of its damage to nearby Enemies upon exploding.

effects.note: splash to nearby enemies; multi-target value, no single-target change

augment:drongo:30.name: Drongo / Shred Spree
augment:drongo:30.sourceText: Shrapnel Cannon's Cooldown is reduced by 85%, but it deals 60% less damage.

augment:drongo:31.name: Drongo / Smog Therapy
augment:drongo:31.sourceText: While standing in Gag Grenade, Yourself and Allied Heroes restore for 10/55/100/145/190 (+105%</></>)</>(+120%</></>)</> Health over its lifetime.

effects.note: assumes the full zone lifetime is stood in; one-beneficiary convention

augment:argus:32.name: Argus / Mana Catalyst
augment:argus:32.sourceText: Restore Mana equal to 10% of damage dealt to Heroes, reduced to 1.5% for Non-Heroes. Basic Attacks restore 2x more.

effects.note: mana restoration from damage; resource economy not in the combat model

augment:argus:33.name: Argus / Arcane Engine
augment:argus:33.sourceText: Dealing Ability Damage to Heroes grants you 1.75% Movement Speed for 1.5s, stacking infinitely - 0.15s CD.

effects.note: stacking movement speed; cadence and uptime unobservable

augment:argus:34.name: Argus / Infinite Obliteration
augment:argus:34.sourceText: Synaptic Obliterator's projectile now have infinite range, travel 25% faster, and Slow for 50% longer.

effects.note: projectile range/speed/slow utility; no damage change

augment:feng-mao:35.name: Feng Mao / Imperial Duelist
augment:feng-mao:35.sourceText: Your Basic Attacks debuff Targets for 3s. Against debuffed Targets, deal 5% more damage and take 5% less damage.

effects.note: assumes the basic-attack debuff is maintained in combat; the 5% damage-taken reduction is not scored

augment:feng-mao:36.name: Feng Mao / Ichorous Glaive
augment:feng-mao:36.sourceText: Killing Enemy Units restores 4% of Missing Health, increased to 35% for Earth Shatter Executions.

effects.note: kill-conditional missing-health restore; execution economy

augment:feng-mao:37.name: Feng Mao / Seismic Smash
augment:feng-mao:37.sourceText: Earth Shatter also Knocks Up Enemies and Stuns for a short duration.

effects.note: knock-up/stun utility; CC not scored

augment:the-fey:38.name: The Fey / Verdant Embrace
augment:the-fey:38.sourceText: Untamed Growth also Heals Yourself and Allies for 30 (+24%</></>)</> over its duration. Healing repeats on Explosion.

effects.note: 30 (+24% MP) doubled for the explosion repeat; one-beneficiary convention
range utility

augment:the-fey:40.name: The Fey / Natural Infusion
augment:the-fey:40.sourceText: Damaging Heroes with Harvest Nettles grants 10 Ability Haste for 6s, stacking infinitely.

effects.note: stacking ability haste on hits; stack uptime vs 6s window unobservable

augment:grim-exe:41.name: Grim Exe / Instant Reload
augment:grim-exe:41.sourceText: GTFO now Executes Heroes that fall below 5% Max Health. When this occurs, GTFO may be re-cast for 8s.

effects.note: execute threshold + recast window; kill-conditional

augment:grim-exe:42.name: Grim Exe / Reboot.exe
augment:grim-exe:42.sourceText: Triggering Pulsefire reduces your Current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 10%, increased to 25% against Heroes.

effects.note: passive-triggered cooldown refund; trigger cadence unobservable

augment:grim-exe:43.name: Grim Exe / System Restore
augment:grim-exe:43.sourceText: Blocking an Ability with Energy Shield restores 20 (+10%</></>)</> Health and grants 20% Decaying Movement Speed over 2s.

effects.note: block-conditional heal and movement; reactive, unmodeled

augment:gadget:44.name: Gadget / Auto-Lock Amp
augment:gadget:44.sourceText: Seek and Destroy's homing speed is increased by 25%.

effects.note: projectile homing speed; reliability utility

augment:gadget:45.name: Gadget / Blast Zone
augment:gadget:45.sourceText: Sticky Mine's explosion radius is increased by 35%. Enhancing a Mine on an Enemy Hero grants 3 additional FDA stacks.

effects.note: explosion radius + passive stack economy

augment:gideon:47.name: Gideon / Abyssal Mantle
augment:gideon:47.sourceText: Upon activating Black Hole, gain a 50 (+75%</></>)</> Shield for 4s.

effects.note: credited once per fight (ult activation); supersedes the stale owned-scrape encoding

augment:gideon:48.name: Gideon / Event Horizon
augment:gideon:48.sourceText: Cosmic Rift deals an additional (+5% Target's Max Health)</> damage to Enemies in the center.

effects.note: assumes center hit
infinite cast range; positional utility

augment:greystone:50.name: Greystone / Tainted Oath
augment:greystone:50.sourceText: Sacred Oath applies 50% Blight to Enemies for 4.5s.

effects.note: applies through Sacred Oath hits; assumed maintained in extended fights

augment:greystone:51.name: Greystone / Imperial Soul
augment:greystone:51.sourceText: Stone Forged Soul deals 12% more damage and its radius is 20% larger.

effects.note: 20% larger radius is multi-target value, not scored

augment:greystone:52.name: Greystone / Close Cut
augment:greystone:52.sourceText: Make Way deals 20% increased damage to the nearest Enemy Unit.

effects.note: nearest-enemy condition modeled as met: kill-window sims are 1v1
Blink trinket cooldown; trinkets are outside the kit model

augment:grux:54.name: Grux / Lust For Blood
augment:grux:54.sourceText: Heal for 5-11.3% of damage dealt to Enemies afflicted with Max Bloodlust stacks. Increases with Hero Level.

effects.note: heal scales with damage at max Bloodlust stacks; stack-state conditional

augment:howitzer:56.name: Howitzer / Blast Off!
augment:howitzer:56.sourceText: Land Mine's cooldown is 12% lower and blasts Targets 30% further.

effects.note: stronger knockback not scored

augment:howitzer:57.name: Howitzer / Combat Thrusters
augment:howitzer:57.sourceText: Gain 40%/70%/130% Movement Speed during Make It Rain.

effects.note: movement speed during ult; mobility utility

augment:howitzer:58.name: Howitzer / Sniper Shells
augment:howitzer:58.sourceText: Howitzer's Basic Attacks grant him 4% Total Attack Speed and 2% Omnivamp for 4.5s, stacking up to 5 times.

effects.note: on-hit AS/omnivamp stacking; cadence unobservable

augment:kira:59.name: Kira / Bringer Of Mercy
augment:kira:59.sourceText: Mercy costs 10 less Mana and reduces Kira's Current Ability Cooldowns by 0.75s upon dealing damage.

effects.note: per-hit ripple reduction of all current cooldowns; cross-ability cadence not yet modeled (mana discount not scored)

augment:kira:60.name: Kira / Siphoning Purge
augment:kira:60.sourceText: Purge Heals for 25% of its damage dealt to Heroes.

effects.note: heals 25% of ult damage dealt; damage-coupled healing not yet modeled

augment:iggy-scorch:62.name: Iggy Scorch / Badlands Belch
augment:iggy-scorch:62.sourceText: Belch deals an additional (+7/8.5/10% Target's Missing Health)</> damage and Knocks Back 30% further.

effects.note: targets passive Belch, which is outside the kit model

augment:iggy-scorch:63.name: Iggy Scorch / Hold This!
augment:iggy-scorch:63.sourceText: Molotov permanently gains +5 Explosion Damage against Heroes each time its Explosion hits one.

effects.note: permanent per-hit damage stacking; accumulation cadence unobservable

augment:iggy-scorch:64.name: Iggy Scorch / Turret Maniac
augment:iggy-scorch:64.sourceText: Increase your Maximum Number of Turrets to 4, but they have 20% less Health.

effects.note: turret count/health economy

augment:kallari:65.name: Kallari / Critical Override
augment:kallari:65.sourceText: Kallari's Abilities can Critically Strike, but her Critical Damage is decreased by 35%.

effects.note: maxPct bakes the UNVERIFIED 1.75 crit multiplier: 100% crit x (1.75 - 1.35) = +40%; remeasure with critMultiplier

augment:kallari:66.name: Kallari / Execution Mandate
augment:kallari:66.sourceText: Takedowns reduce Current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 40%.

effects.note: takedown-conditional cooldown refund

augment:kallari:67.name: Kallari / Deadly Finesse
augment:kallari:67.sourceText: If Crippling Dagger hits a Hero or kills an Enemy Unit, reduce its Cooldown by 1.5s. Hero hits also restore 20 Mana.

effects.note: hit-conditional, modeled as hitting; 20 mana refund not scored
dash range utility

augment:khaimera:69.name: Khaimera / Jungle Invasion
augment:khaimera:69.sourceText: Based on Hero Level, gain 3-17 Physical Power while in the Jungle. Increases to 6-34 in the Enemy Jungle.

effects.note: jungle-location-conditional power

augment:khaimera:70.name: Khaimera / Lane Lurker
augment:khaimera:70.sourceText: Ancestral Fury also grants Rage against Minions, but its Health Regen is reduced by 25%/15%/5%/0% (at level 1/6/11/16).

effects.note: passive trade-off vs minions with regen penalty; lane-state dependent

augment:kwang:71.name: Kwang / Heavenly Tactician
augment:kwang:71.sourceText: Fury of the Heavens' Cooldown is reduced by 20s and Kwang no longer retrieves his Heavenly Blade upon Recalling.

effects.note: blade-retrieval change not scored

augment:kwang:72.name: Kwang / Aura of the Heavens
augment:kwang:72.sourceText: Gain 5% Omnivamp. Nearby Allied Heroes gain 4% Omnivamp.

effects.note: ally aura share is team-side, not scored

augment:kwang:73.name: Kwang / Slayer of the Heavens
augment:kwang:73.sourceText: Strike of the Heavens deals 25% more damage and reduces Cooldowns by 25% more.

effects.note: targets passive Strike of the Heavens, which is outside the kit model

augment:zarus:74.name: Zarus / Flow State
augment:zarus:74.sourceText: Evade's Cooldown is 15% lower and its Cooldown resets on Takedown.

effects.note: Evade is outside the damage/heal model and the reset is takedown-conditional

augment:zarus:75.name: Zarus / Master Of Spears
augment:zarus:75.sourceText: Spear Of Nyr's Cooldown is only 50% longer when thrown.

effects.note: halves a conditional cooldown penalty; throw-state dependent

augment:zarus:76.name: Zarus / The Ascended
augment:zarus:76.sourceText: Gain +5 Health</> and +1 Physical Power</> every minute.

augment:lt-belica:77.name: Lt Belica / Devastating Bombs
augment:lt-belica:77.sourceText: Void Bomb deals 15% more damage to Isolated Targets.

effects.note: isolated-target condition modeled as met: kill-window sims are 1v1

augment:lt-belica:78.name: Lt Belica / Pulsefire Rounds
augment:lt-belica:78.sourceText: Lt. Belica's Basic Attacks also deal (+10%</></>)</>(+12%</></>)</> Damage</> On-Hit.

augment:lt-belica:79.name: Lt Belica / Combat Veteran
augment:lt-belica:79.sourceText: Passively gain +0.1-3 Experience</> each second. Increases with Hero Level.

effects.note: passive experience income; economy not scored

augment:morigesh:80.name: Morigesh / Cursed Infestation
augment:morigesh:80.sourceText: Hive deals 12% more damage and has 10% increased range.

effects.note: 10% range not scored

augment:morigesh:81.name: Morigesh / Ritual Of Death
augment:morigesh:81.sourceText: Curse heals Morigesh for 70%/80%/90% of damage dealt. Takedowns also decrease Curse's Cooldown by 20s.

effects.note: heals 70-90% of ult damage dealt (damage-coupled) and takedown cooldown refund; not yet modeled

augment:morigesh:82.name: Morigesh / Spirit Shred
augment:morigesh:82.sourceText: Morigesh's Basic Attacks Shred 3.5% Magical Armor for 4s, stacking up to 5 times.

effects.note: 5 stacks x 3.5%; ramp assumes one stack per second of basic attacks

augment:murdock:83.name: Murdock / Justice's Reach
augment:murdock:83.sourceText: Shots Fired now pierces units and has +300 additional range.

effects.note: targets passive Shots Fired (pierce/range), outside the kit model

augment:murdock:84.name: Murdock / Sting Operation
augment:murdock:84.sourceText: Murdock gains 2 additional Max Static Trap Charges and Static Traps are 20% larger.

effects.note: trap charges/size; zone control utility

augment:murdock:85.name: Murdock / Martial Law
augment:murdock:85.sourceText: Long Arm Of The Law deals 12% more damage and grants +50g</> on Hero Kill.

effects.note: kill gold not scored

augment:muriel:86.name: Muriel / Circuit Reset
augment:muriel:86.sourceText: Upon Shielding a Hero with Alacrity, reduce their Current Ability Cooldowns by 1.5s.

effects.note: reduces the shielded ALLY's cooldowns; team-side value outside the single-hero sim

augment:muriel:87.name: Muriel / Essence Nullifier
augment:muriel:87.sourceText: Serenity's Max Charge Damage also drains 10 (+3/4.5/6/7.5/9% Target's Current Mana)</> Mana, dealing it as true damage.

effects.note: drains and converts target mana; target resource state unknown

augment:narbash:90.name: Narbash / Percussive Tear
augment:narbash:90.sourceText: Each hit of Crash Bang Boom! Shreds 2.5% Armors for 3s.

effects.note: per-hit shred counted once (ult hit count unstated); undercounts multi-hit channels

augment:phase:92.name: Phase / Psychic Support
augment:phase:92.sourceText: Essence Catalyst also restores your Linked Ally's Mana by (+12% Target's Missing Mana)</> over the duration.

effects.note: restores the Linked ALLY's mana; team-side value outside the single-hero sim

augment:phase:93.name: Phase / Kindred Surge
augment:phase:93.sourceText: Hyperflux grants 10% more Movement Speed and (+1.2% </></>)</> Health Regen for its duration.

effects.note: ult-duration regen and movement speed; uptime-bound utility

augment:phase:94.name: Phase / Final Flash
augment:phase:94.sourceText: Energy Lance is 30% shorter but deals 20/30/40/50/70% more damage.

effects.note: per-rank 20/30/40/50/70% encoded as the mean (damage-parser convention); 30% shorter lance is positional, not scored

augment:rampage:95.name: Rampage / Rock & Awe
augment:rampage:95.sourceText: Boulder Throw deals 0-100% more damage, based on distance thrown (capped at 6000 units).

effects.note: damage scales with throw distance; positional

augment:rampage:96.name: Rampage / The Rumbling
augment:rampage:96.sourceText: Rumble's Cooldown is refunded when it deals damage, but it deals 35% less damage, costs 10 more Mana, and Slows Rampage by 60% while active.

effects.note: refund-on-damage loop with damage/mana/self-slow penalties; net value depends on uptime loops, not mappable

augment:rampage:97.name: Rampage / Tiny Titan
augment:rampage:97.sourceText: Behemoth shrinks Rampage instead, granting him no Combat Penalty and 35/40/45% Total Attack Speed, but he receives 45% more damage.

effects.note: conditional ult form trade (AS for +45% damage taken); risk profile outside the sim

augment:revenant:98.name: Revenant / Quickdraw
augment:revenant:98.sourceText: Revenant reloads 35% faster and jumps 25% higher.

effects.note: reload speed and jump height; cadence utility

augment:revenant:99.name: Revenant / Hellfire Blast
augment:revenant:99.sourceText: Helllfire Rounds' Fourth Shot deals 7% more damage and ignores 30% Bonus Physical Armor.

effects.note: fourth-shot-only amp and bonus-armor bypass; ~1.75% mean basic amp is below the modeling floor

augment:revenant:100.name: Revenant / Spectral Bounty
augment:revenant:100.sourceText: Reckoning now grants 3x Bounty Hunter gold and 4 (+25% of stolen stats) Physical & Magical Power on Kill.

effects.note: kill-conditional bounty gold and stat steal; economy

augment:riktor:103.name: Riktor / Wanton Warden
augment:riktor:103.sourceText: Regenerate Health equal to 4-7% of damage taken over 5s. Increases with Hero Level.

effects.note: regenerates a share of damage taken; incoming-damage-coupled sustain not modeled

augment:serath:104.name: Serath / Crushing Descent
augment:serath:104.sourceText: Ascend now Stuns for 0.2s when it deals damage.

effects.note: adds a stun; CC not scored

augment:serath:105.name: Serath / Vital Resonance
augment:serath:105.sourceText: Fallen Grace's Visages restore (+170%</></>)</> Health on pick-up.

effects.note: pickup-conditional healing; positional

augment:sevarog:107.name: Sevarog / Gravebreaker
augment:sevarog:107.sourceText: Colossal Blow's Knock Back is 15% stronger. Each Soul Tier increases this by 30% more.

effects.note: knockback strength; CC utility

augment:sevarog:108.name: Sevarog / Unholy Pursuit
augment:sevarog:108.sourceText: Phantom Rush grants 2 Souls when it damages a Hero. Its Cooldown also resets when Colossal Blow hits a Hero.

effects.note: soul economy and conditional cooldown reset

augment:sevarog:109.name: Sevarog / Grim Harvest
augment:sevarog:109.sourceText: Siphon now Executes Enemies that fall below 6% Max Health.

effects.note: execute threshold; kill-conditional

augment:sparrow:113.name: Sparrow / Endless Hunt
augment:sparrow:113.sourceText: Takedowns reset Sparrow's Basic Ability Cooldowns and permanently grant 1 Physical Penetration.

effects.note: takedown resets and permanent pen stacking; game-state economy

augment:sparrow:115.name: Sparrow / Inner Fury
augment:sparrow:115.sourceText: Inner Fire now releases a fan of 5 arrows, has 8% more range, and fires 2 more volleys.

effects.note: arrow fan and extra volleys; single-target share of the spread is unstated

augment:steel:116.name: Steel / Adaptive Force
augment:steel:116.sourceText: Force Shield's Cooldown is 3s lower and now has 2 charges, but is reduced in size.

effects.note: Force Shield charges; the ability is outside the damage/heal model so the cooldown change scores nothing

augment:steel:118.name: Steel / Colossal Crash
augment:steel:118.sourceText: Shield Slam's has 10% longer range, its area of effect is 10% larger, and Knocks Back Enemies on impact instead.

effects.note: range/area/knockback; CC utility

augment:terra:119.name: Terra / Axe Retrieval
augment:terra:119.sourceText: Highland Hurl can be picked up, reducing its Cooldown by 45%.

effects.note: pickup-conditional cooldown refund; positional

augment:terra:120.name: Terra / Iron Resolve
augment:terra:120.sourceText: Wild Rush grants 30/33/36/39/42% Damage Reduction while it is Channeling.

effects.note: damage reduction while channeling; uptime-bound

augment:terra:121.name: Terra / Hersir's Will
augment:terra:121.sourceText: While Unstoppable Force is active, gain a stack of Hersir every 0.6s.

effects.note: passive stack generation during ult; stack economy

augment:yurei:122.name: Yurei / Soul Weaver
augment:yurei:122.sourceText: Soul Storm grants 20% (+5% per Hero Hit)</> Damage Reduction while active, and its Cooldown is 8% lower.

effects.note: damage reduction while active is uptime-bound, not scored

augment:yurei:123.name: Yurei / Hallowed Reverberation
augment:yurei:123.sourceText: Hallowed Strikes gains 150 additional range and bounces 2 more times.

effects.note: targets passive Hallowed Strikes (range/bounces), outside the kit model

augment:yurei:124.name: Yurei / Ephemeral Surge
augment:yurei:124.sourceText: Destroying Torn Spirits restores 3% of your Maximum Mana and grants 35% Decaying Movement Speed over 2.5s.

effects.note: pickup-conditional mana/speed; positional
range utility

augment:twinblast:126.name: Twinblast / Grenadier
augment:twinblast:126.sourceText: Vortex Grenades has 1 additional Max Charge. Rocket Dash grants 1 charge on use.

effects.note: grenade charges; cadence economy

augment:mourn:129.name: Mourn / Nightmare Extractor
augment:mourn:129.sourceText: Casting an Ability reduces the Cooldown of Extract by 20%.

effects.note: targets passive Extract, which is outside the kit model

augment:mourn:130.name: Mourn / Dreadful Roots
augment:mourn:130.sourceText: If Abduct hits Terrain, Mourn pulls himself towards it.

effects.note: terrain-pull mobility

augment:wraith:131.name: Wraith / Mystic Marksman
augment:wraith:131.sourceText: Knock, Knock! deals Magical Damage instead.

effects.note: swaps Knock Knock to magical damage; situational vs armor profiles, no magnitude change

augment:wraith:132.name: Wraith / Sniper's Bounty
augment:wraith:132.sourceText: Killing Blows from Knock Knock! grant +6g</>, increased to +40g</> for Heroes.

effects.note: kill gold; economy

augment:wraith:133.name: Wraith / Illusionist
augment:wraith:133.sourceText: Surprise, Surprise! grants its effects to nearby Allied Heroes, but its Cooldown is 20% higher.

effects.note: shares passive effects with allies at a 20% cooldown penalty; team-side value, solo cost

augment:wukong:134.name: Wukong / Prosperous Path
augment:wukong:134.sourceText: Body Stance: Kills grant +4g</>. Spirit Stance: Kills restore +2.5% Missing Health</>.

effects.note: kill-conditional gold/heal per stance; economy

augment:wukong:135.name: Wukong / Masterful Mimicry
augment:wukong:135.sourceText: Gain 1 more Max Clone and generate a stack of Hair every 5.5s.

effects.note: clone and stack economy

augment:wukong:136.name: Wukong / From Up High
augment:wukong:136.sourceText: High Impact's Height Damage is no longer capped to 1500u, now dealing more damage at greater heights.

effects.note: height-scaled damage cap removal; positional

augment:yin:137.name: Yin / Energy Transfer
augment:yin:137.sourceText: Deflecting a projectile grants 20% Decaying Movement Speed over 2s and a 44-350 Shield for 3s.

effects.note: deflect-conditional shield/speed; reactive

augment:yin:138.name: Yin / Storm of Salvation
augment:yin:138.sourceText: Windburn lasts for 1s longer and grants (+0.75% Missing Health)</> Healing On-Hit while active. Healing is 20% effective against Non-Heroes.

effects.note: own-missing-health on-hit healing during Windburn; health-state conditional

augment:yin:139.name: Yin / Serpent's Blessing
augment:yin:139.sourceText: Lash Kick's Cooldown is reduced by 50% when used on Terrain.

effects.note: terrain-conditional cooldown reduction; positional

augment:zinx:140.name: Zinx / Disc Of Demise
augment:zinx:140.sourceText: Ricochet bounces 25% further and each hit reduces its Current Cooldown by 5%, increased to 10% for Heroes.

effects.note: credits the minimum one hero hit per cast; extra bounce hits not counted

augment:zinx:141.name: Zinx / Heal Matrix
augment:zinx:141.sourceText: Infuse now has 2 charges but heals 15% less.

effects.note: charge semantics (2 charges, -15% heal): burst-vs-throughput trade not mappable onto cooldown math

augment:zinx:142.name: Zinx / Terminal Treatment
augment:zinx:142.sourceText: Refibrillator's On-Hit damage increases by 0-60%, based on Target's Missing Health.

effects.note: targets passive on-hit damage, missing-health scaled; outside the kit model

augment:renna:143.name: Renna / Netherward
augment:renna:143.sourceText: Upon using Soulfire, gain a 40 (+40%</></>)</> Shield for 2s.

effects.note: credited once per fight (Soulfire cast)

augment:renna:144.name: Renna / Vital Essence
augment:renna:144.sourceText: Picking up Essence grants +4g</> and restores 3.5% Missing Health and Mana.

effects.note: essence pickup gold/restore; economy

augment:renna:145.name: Renna / Communion
augment:renna:145.sourceText: Mortal Coil no longer Executes but has 20% increased Radius. Ally Heroes now heal themselves upon damaging targets in its area, at 100% effectiveness.

effects.note: converts Mortal Coil execute into an ally self-heal zone; team-side rework

augment:akeron:146.name: Akeron / Death From Above
augment:akeron:146.sourceText: Akeron can fire an additional web projectile from the wall or ground once, allowing him to leap from surface to surface or to Root from where he hangs.

effects.note: mobility/root utility; no stated combat numbers

augment:akeron:147.name: Akeron / Roar of Torment
augment:akeron:147.sourceText: Consume now Pushes instead of Pulls and deals 200% increased tick damage, but can no longer bite.

effects.note: Consume tick-vs-bite damage split is unstated, so the 200% tick amp cannot be valued

augment:bayle:149.name: Bayle / Frenzied Fighter
augment:bayle:149.sourceText: Berserk has no cooldown and can remain on indefinitely while under the Health threshold.

effects.note: removes Berserk cooldown below a health threshold; uptime-conditional

augment:bayle:150.name: Bayle / Betrayer's Reqiuem
augment:bayle:150.sourceText: Kingslayer uppercuts all Enemies in an area around the initial Target. Additionally, Kingslayer's Cooldown is reduced by 15%.

effects.note: area uppercut is multi-target value; no single-target change

augment:bayle:151.name: Bayle / Swift Strikes
augment:bayle:151.sourceText: After casting an ability, Bayle gains 45% Attack Speed for one attack. Additionally, he automatically starts with the 3rd attack in his Basic Attack chain, but it always deals 25% decreased damage.

effects.note: one-attack AS windows and chain restructure; cadence unobservable

augment:eden:152.name: Eden / Focal Lens
augment:eden:152.sourceText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Tachyon Lance shreds their Physical Armor by 20% for 4s and reduces the cooldown by 1s.

augment:eden:153.name: Eden / Kinetic Waltz
augment:eden:153.sourceText: Axiom Strike deals 90% damage, has 30% reduced cooldown and grants 35% movement speed for 1.5s when damaging Enemy Heroes.

effects.note: applies to the Axiom Strike stance of the shared slot; movement speed not scored

augment:eden:154.name: Eden / Limit Break: Echo
augment:eden:154.sourceText: After casting Limit Break, the cooldowns of your basic abilities in your current stance are instantly refreshed.

effects.note: full basic-cooldown refresh on ult cast; rotation restructure, no tractable closed form yet

augment:maco:155.name: Maco / Ferocious Flight
augment:maco:155.sourceText: For each Enemy hit by Maco Fly, Maco gains 30/50/70/90/110 (+10%</></>)</>(+1.25%</></>)</> additional Shielding and the ability's Cooldown is reduced by 1s. This effect also occurs on non-Heroes, but is reduced by 80%.

effects.note: counted for one enemy hit (single-target convention); own-max-health shield scaling not counted (base health outside item stats)

augment:maco:156.name: Maco / Longshot
augment:maco:156.sourceText: Maco Sparkle's damage scales linearly based on how far it travels from 100% to 200% damage.

effects.note: damage scales with projectile travel distance; positional

augment:maco:157.name: Maco / Shatterbloom
augment:maco:157.sourceText: Maco Strike creates a Healing field at the explosion location that Heals 15/25/35 (+4%</></>)</> every 0.25s for 5s.

effects.note: 20 ticks x 15/25/35 (+4% MP each) folded to per-cast totals; assumes full field uptime, one beneficiary

augment:neon:158.name: Neon / Ghost in the Machine
augment:neon:158.sourceText: After dashing with Erase Vector, become invisible for 1s.

effects.note: invisibility utility

augment:neon:159.name: Neon / Dox
augment:neon:159.sourceText: Replace your trinket with Dox, granting you 5% increased Magical Power & 15% increased Maximum Mana. Activating it allows you to see nearby Enemy Heroes within 3000u for 4s.

effects.note: replaces the trinket; active vision not scored

augment:neon:160.name: Neon / RAM
augment:neon:160.sourceText: Gain 5 Magical Power and 25% Base Mana Regen on takedown, stacking infinitely. At 3 stacks gain 5% Movement Speed. Upon death, lost 50% of stacks rounded up.

effects.note: takedown stacking with death decay; game-state economy

augment:kira:161.name: Kira / Lenore
augment:kira:161.sourceText: Shadow Glide refreshes the cooldown of Nevermore and it deals (+30%</></>)</> bonus Damage</>.

effects.note: targets passive Nevermore, which is outside the kit model

augment:mourn:162.name: Mourn / Nightstalker
augment:mourn:162.sourceText: Eclipse's bonus Movement Speed is increased to 70%/120%/200%.

effects.note: ult movement speed; mobility utility

augment:narbash:163.name: Narbash / War Anthem
augment:narbash:163.sourceText: Song Of My People and March no longer heal. Instead, they each grant +8/7.5/10/12.5/15% Physical Power while active.

effects.note: removes March/Song healing for power while active; WARNING - taking this invalidates the kit heal model for those abilities, and toggle uptime is unstated

augment:sparrow:164.name: Sparrow / Sun Shards
augment:sparrow:164.sourceText: Sparrow's basic attacks ricochet 1/2/3/4 times, dealing (+20%</></>) Damage</> and applying On-Hit effects at 35%</> effectiveness.

effects.note: ricochets hit other targets; no single-target change

augment:shinbi:165.name: Shinbi / Crescendo
augment:shinbi:165.sourceText: Shinbi’s final Basic Attack within her chain deals Magical Damage and 15 (+35%</></>)</>(+30%</></>)</> bonus damage.

effects.note: chain-final basic bonus; chain length is unstated in our data

augment:steel:166.name: Steel / Heavy Metal
augment:steel:166.sourceText: Heavy Punches and Shield Bash deal Bonus Magical Damage On-Hit equal to 10% of your Total Physical Armor and Magical Armor.

effects.note: item-granted armor only (base armor is outside item stats) - undercounts; heavy-punch half needs chain cadence, not scored

augment:aurora:167.name: Aurora / Glacial Thorns
augment:aurora:167.sourceText: Glacial Charge spawns Hoarfrost Crystals at its base that deal 40/60/80/100/120 (+20%</></>)</> Damage and Root for 0.5s.

effects.note: 0.5s root not scored

augment:riktor:168.name: Riktor / Zap O' 9-Chains
augment:riktor:168.sourceText: On Ability Cast, Riktor’s next Basic Attack within 3s zaps 9 nearby Enemies, dealing 15 (+4 per Level)(+25%</> </>)</>(+30%</></>)</> Damage</>.

effects.note: fires once per ability cast (next-basic zap); single-target convention counts one of the 9 chains

augment:skylar:169.name: Skylar / Assault MK-II
augment:skylar:169.sourceText: Air Assault hovers for 0.5s longer and fires an additional missile with each attack.

effects.note: extra missile per attack; per-missile damage share unstated

augment:grux:170.name: Grux / Red Mist
augment:grux:170.sourceText: Gain 10% Total Attack Speed per Enemy Hero or Camp Leader with Bloodlust applied within 1800 units.

effects.note: attack speed per marked enemy in radius; proximity stacking

augment:muriel:171.name: Muriel / Sacrosanct
augment:muriel:171.sourceText: Casting Reversal of Fortune on an Allied Hero immediately creates a Consecrated Ground at the current level at the target location.

effects.note: the free Consecrated Ground is credited at its rank-5 stated heal (140 +20% MP); assumes Q maxed by the time R matters

augment:shinbi:172.name: Shinbi / Encore
augment:shinbi:172.sourceText: If a Target dies while being damaged by All Kill, the Cooldown is reset.

effects.note: kill-conditional ult reset

augment:aurora:173.name: Aurora / Hypothermia
augment:aurora:173.sourceText: Damaging Enemy Heroes with Boreal Sweep shreds 15% Physical Armor and Magical Armor and slows Attack Speed by 20% for 3s.

effects.note: enemy attack-speed slow not scored

augment:akeron:174.name: Akeron / Trapdoor Demon
augment:akeron:174.sourceText: Akeron becomes camouflaged when attaching to terrain, gaining 1.5% Max Health Regen and generating 8 Hunger per second while he remains there.

effects.note: terrain-attach camouflage regen/resource; positional

augment:gadget:175.name: Gadget / Eureka!
augment:gadget:175.sourceText: At 200 FDA stacks, gain a level. At 500 FDA stacks, gain +60% Jump Height.

effects.note: level/jump-height economy at passive stack thresholds

augment:riktor:176.name: Riktor / Warden's Leash
augment:riktor:176.sourceText: Riplash now also hooks Allies, refunding 60% of its Cooldown and 60% of its Cost on Ally hit.

effects.note: ally-hook refund; team-side and positional

augment:countess:177.name: Countess / Shadow Echo
augment:countess:177.sourceText: Repeat Shadow Slip's damage effect at your current location when swapping places with your Shadow.

effects.note: assumes the Shadow Slip swap recast is taken every cast (the damage repeat is the point of the augment)

augment:dekker:178.name: Dekker / Nothin' But Net
augment:dekker:178.sourceText: Stasis Bomb grants +25g</> and +2 Magical Power</> when it damages a Hero.

effects.note: per-hit gold and Magical Power grants; stack duration unstated, economy not scored

augment:dekker:179.name: Dekker / Polarity Strike
augment:dekker:179.sourceText: Ion Strike also grants a 150/250/350 (+50%</></>)</>(+10% Target's Missing Health)</> Shield to Allied Heroes for 3.5s.

effects.note: missing-health bonus shield not counted (target state unknown); one-beneficiary convention

augment:twinblast:180.name: Twinblast / Spray 'N Pray
augment:twinblast:180.sourceText: Ventilate deals 50% more damage, but has reduced accuracy at longer ranges.

effects.note: accuracy penalty at long range is positional, not scored - treat as close-range value

augment:narbash:181.name: Narbash / Thonk
augment:narbash:181.sourceText: Thunk falls to the floor if it hits an Enemy. If Narbash picks it up he refunds 35% of its Cooldown and 50% of its Mana Cost.

effects.note: pickup-positional cooldown/mana refund

augment:serath:182.name: Serath / Wrath Unleashed
augment:serath:182.sourceText: Applying an On-Hit Effect to an Enemy Hero grants +0.75% Attack Speed for 3s, stacking infinitely.

effects.note: infinite on-hit AS stacking; cadence unobservable

augment:adele:184.name: Adele / Court of Roses
augment:adele:184.sourceText: Iron Rose grants nearest Ally a 5s barrier with 15% Damage Reduction and attaches Thorned Vines to nearby Enemy Heroes dealing 50% damage.

effects.note: ally barrier + thorned-vine zone; team-side and positional, outside the single-hero sim

augment:adele:186.name: Adele / Tyrant of Thorns
augment:adele:186.sourceText: Adele triggers Crown of Thorns at 250% effectiveness. Royal Flourish has 9/8.5/8/7.5/7 Cooldown and provides 50% Movement Speed, but no longer Mesmerizes.

effects.note: rewrites passive effectiveness and overrides Royal Flourish cooldown/CC; structural rework, no tractable mapping

augment:adele:193.name: Adele / Seeds of Dominion
augment:adele:193.sourceText: Imperial Lash spawns a Thornbush under the dash target, reducing its Cooldown by 12%. Enemies are Slowed 10% and take 2/2.5/3/3.5/4 True Damage per 35u moved inside the Thornbush.

effects.note: Thornbush slow and movement-metered true damage are positional, not scored

augment:legion:635.name: Legion / Press the Advantage
augment:legion:635.sourceText: Upon achieving a Takedown, a Rally Point is spawned at the dead Targets location. Rally Point no longer grants Health Regeneration but increases Legions Rate of Fire by 12/18/22/26/30% and grants Allies 10/12.5/15/17.5/20% Attack Speed.

effects.note: reworks Rally Point into a team fire-rate aura; team-side and takedown-conditional

augment:legion:636.name: Legion / Scorched Earth
augment:legion:636.sourceText: Frag Order and Saturation Charge Mines create Napalm zones upon exploding and Orbital Sanction creates one every 0.5s. Napalm zones deal 5 (+6% Bonus Physical Power) Physical Damage per 0.5s and last 3s.

effects.note: napalm zone DoTs; zone uptime and overlap unobservable

augment:legion:661.name: Legion / Heavy Caliber
augment:legion:661.sourceText: Basic Attack Timer is increased to 0.75s, but deal 310% damage and have 100 increased range. Magazine Size is decreased to 6.

effects.note: basic-attack restructure (timer set to 0.75s, magazine 6); not mappable onto the attack-speed model

augment:aurora:11.name: Aurora / Deep Freeze
augment:aurora:11.sourceText: Cryoseism's area of effect is 20% larger.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim
new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:skylar:16.name: Skylar / Suppressive Fire
augment:skylar:16.sourceText: While Air Assault is active, Basic Attack range is increased by 12%.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:countess:22.name: Countess / Shadow Strike
augment:countess:22.sourceText: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks or Abilities reduces Shadow Slip's Cooldown by 6%, up to once per ability.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:dekker:26.name: Dekker / Momentum Boost
augment:dekker:26.sourceText: Rocket Boots also grants Yourself and nearby Allies 30% Decaying Movement Speed over 3s.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:dekker:27.name: Dekker / Ionic Surge
augment:dekker:27.sourceText: Ion Strike's Stun radius is increased by 30%. Upon Stunning, it Shreds Armors by 15% for 3s.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:gadget:46.name: Gadget / Ion Barrier
augment:gadget:46.sourceText: Security Gate grants Yourself and Allied Heroes a 50 (+55%) Shield for 3s when they first pass through.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:grux:55.name: Grux / Warlord's Might
augment:grux:55.sourceText: Warlord's Challenge's duration is increased by 0.3s On-Hit, decreased to 0.15s for Non-Heroes.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:kira:61.name: Kira / Dusk's Embrace
augment:kira:61.sourceText: Dusk deals an additional (+6%/6.5%/7%/7.5%/8% Target's Missing Health) damage to Enemies afflicted with Max Vengeance stacks.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:muriel:88.name: Muriel / Aerial Assistance
augment:muriel:88.sourceText: Reversal Of Fortune Cleanses the Ally it is used on and grants them 1.75s of CC Immunity.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:narbash:89.name: Narbash / Berserker Beat
augment:narbash:89.sourceText: March also grants Allies 15/20/25/30/35% Attack Speed.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:narbash:91.name: Narbash / Rhythmic Recharge
augment:narbash:91.sourceText: Narbash restores Mana equal to 12% of damage received.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:riktor:101.name: Riktor / Brutal Chains
augment:riktor:101.sourceText: Riplash has 10% more range. Successful hits reduce its Cooldown by 30%.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:riktor:102.name: Riktor / Current Overload
augment:riktor:102.sourceText: Electrocute grants 8% more Movement Speed and deals 30% more damage to Monsters.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:serath:106.name: Serath / Wrath Unleashed
augment:serath:106.sourceText: Serath gains 20/25/30% Critical Chance while Heresy is active.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:shinbi:110.name: Shinbi / Showstopper
augment:shinbi:110.sourceText: Rushing Beat applies 2 stacks of Track to Heroes upon damaging them.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:shinbi:111.name: Shinbi / Natural Talent
augment:shinbi:111.sourceText: Upon killing a Camp Leader or Siege Minion, permanently gain +0.75 Ability Haste.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:shinbi:112.name: Shinbi / Bites Per Minute
augment:shinbi:112.sourceText: Ability hits reduce Biting Melody's Cooldown by 1s more.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:sparrow:114.name: Sparrow / Veiled Stalker
augment:sparrow:114.sourceText: Upon activating Heightened Senses, Sparrow enters Stealth and gains 30% Movement Speed for 1.5s.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:steel:117.name: Steel / Bulldozer
augment:steel:117.sourceText: While using Bull Rush, become Unstoppable and gain 25% Damage Reduction.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:twinblast:127.name: Twinblast / Hotshot
augment:twinblast:127.sourceText: Ventilate Pushes Back nearby Enemies, its force increasing the closer they are to you.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:mourn:128.name: Mourn / Contagioned Eclipse
augment:mourn:128.sourceText: Eclipse applies Contagion to all Heroes on activation.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim

augment:akeron:148.name: Akeron / Insatiable Hunger
augment:akeron:148.sourceText: Instead of decaying over time, Hunger regenerates over time and is not gained by hitting abilities. Additionally, Awakened lasts twice as long.

effects.note: new 1.15 hero augment; effect not yet modeled by the sim
